title: DOJ targets Nvidia, Meme stock comeback, Trump fundraiser in SF, Apple/OpenAI, Texas stock market
description:
(0:00) Besties intros!

(2:10) Responding to recent media coverage

(17:58) DOJ/FTC strike deal to target Nvidia, OpenAI, and Microsoft

(32:40) Meme stocks are back: Keith Gill aka Roaring Kitty resurfaces, disclosing nine figure position in GameStop

(58:36) Citadel and BlackRock back TXSE to take on NYSE and Nasdaq

(1:02:34) Apple to announce OpenAI iPhone deal at WWDC

(1:09:07) Science Corner: Alarming ocean temps continue, what to expect for hurricane season

analysis.summary: The episode covers various topics including the DOJ targeting Nvidia, the resurgence of meme stocks, and Apple's potential partnership with OpenAI. The hosts also discuss the new Texas stock exchange and its potential impact on the market. Additionally, they touch on the topic of ocean temperatures and hurricane season.

takeaways.text: DOJ targets Nvidia, OpenAI, and Microsoft
Meme stocks are back with Keith Gill's nine-figure position in GameStop
Citadel and BlackRock back TXSE to take on NYSE and Nasdaq
Apple to announce OpenAI iPhone deal at WWDC
Ocean temperatures are alarming and may impact hurricane season
New Texas stock exchange aims to compete with NYSE and Nasdaq
Regulatory environment is changing for tech companies

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss both positive and negative developments in the tech industry, resulting in a mixed sentiment.

notable_moments.description: DOJ targets Nvidia, OpenAI, and Microsoft
Meme stocks are back with Keith Gill's nine-figure position in GameStop
